creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 168950
Add more utilities to nss-packages, minor improvements

The package could benefit from several other of the binaries built with the port already.

The attached patch adds these. It also streamlines the installation of these binaries and renames the "test" target into "do-test" in accordance with the recent changes to bsd.ports.mk

A PORTREVISION bump is in order too -- unless the change is committed together with the next PORTVERSION.
